selection_rule: Top 50 probes ranked by one-way ANOVA F statistic after variance filtering and global z-score normalization.
Top 25 probes ranked by the same one-way ANOVA F statistic used for the top-50 branch.
Sample 50 probes uniformly without replacement from the middle 40% of the ANOVA F ranking (ranks 4819-11245 of 16063) after excluding the top and bottom 30%.
Use all retained probes after variance filtering and global z-score normalization; no adaptive subset selection beyond preprocessing.
